posts.title: Building a 50-Agent Multi-Agent DAG Pipeline
posts.excerpt: How I designed and built Busara AI's 7-stage parallel DAG pipeline with 50 specialized agents — from Kahn's topological sort to circuit breakers and O(1) LRU caching.
posts.description: Deep technical breakdown of Busara AI's 50-agent multi-agent DAG pipeline. Covers Kahn's topological sort, parallel execution, circuit breakers, O(1) LRU caching, and 7-stage orchestration in TypeScript.

posts.title: KilimoPRO: AI for 5 Million Kenyan Farmers
posts.excerpt: Designing agricultural intelligence that works offline on low-end Android phones. Integrating KilimoSTAT, FAOSTAT, Google Earth Engine, and KALRO data.
posts.description: How KilimoPRO delivers AI-powered agricultural intelligence to 5 million Kenyan farmers. Architecture, offline-first design, data source integration, and on-device ML.

posts.title: Lessons from China's National Smart Agriculture Action Plan
posts.excerpt: What Kenya can learn from China's space-air-ground monitoring networks, large agricultural models, and the 2024-2028 smart agriculture framework.
posts.description: Comparative analysis of China's 2024-2028 National Smart Agriculture Action Plan and lessons for Kenyan agritech. Covers space-air-ground monitoring, large agricultural models, and policy frameworks.

posts.title: Real Math, Not Vibes: Statistical Algorithms in TypeScript
posts.excerpt: Holt-Winters triple exponential smoothing, OLS regression via normal equation, K-Means++ with silhouette scoring — all from scratch in TypeScript.
posts.description: Implementing real statistical algorithms in TypeScript: Holt-Winters triple exponential smoothing, OLS regression via normal equation, K-Means++ with silhouette scoring. No vibes, just math.

posts.title: The Multi-LLM Council: When One AI Isn't Enough
posts.excerpt: How KilimoPRO uses 5 expert AI personas (agronomist, economist, climate scientist, extension officer, risk manager) to deliberate complex farming decisions.
posts.description: Designing a Multi-LLM Council where 5 expert AI personas (agronomist, economist, climate scientist, extension officer, risk manager) deliberate complex farming decisions for KilimoPRO.

posts.title: Quantitative Finance for Agricultural Markets
posts.excerpt: Applying EWMA volatility, GARCH(1,1), Value at Risk (VaR), and RSI from financial markets to agricultural commodity price forecasting.
posts.description: Applying quantitative finance techniques — EWMA volatility, GARCH(1,1), Value at Risk (VaR), and RSI — to agricultural commodity price forecasting in KilimoPRO.

posts.title: 22 Data Sources for Kenyan Agricultural Intelligence
posts.excerpt: A comprehensive inventory of verified, operational data APIs: KilimoSTAT, FAOSTAT, KALRO, Google Earth Engine, Sentinel-2, CHIRPS, ARDC, and more.
posts.description: Comprehensive inventory of 22 verified, operational data APIs for Kenyan agricultural intelligence: KilimoSTAT, FAOSTAT, KALRO, Google Earth Engine, Sentinel-2, CHIRPS, ARDC, and more.

posts.title: On-Device Crop Disease Detection with TensorFlow Lite
posts.excerpt: Training MobileNetV3 on the PlantVillage dataset, quantizing to int8, and running inference on low-end Android phones — completely offline.
posts.description: Building on-device crop disease detection with TensorFlow Lite. Training MobileNetV3 on PlantVillage dataset, int8 quantization, offline inference on low-end Android phones.

posts.title: NASIP 2026-2030: The KES 1.08 Trillion Opportunity
posts.excerpt: Deep analysis of Kenya's National Agri-Food Systems Investment Plan and how technology platforms can operationalize its 9 flagship programs.
posts.description: Deep analysis of Kenya's National Agri-Food Systems Investment Plan (NASIP) 2026-2030 — a KES 1.08 trillion opportunity. 9 flagship programs and how tech platforms can operationalize them.

site.name: Victor Ndunda
site.description: AI Engineer building multi-agent intelligence systems and agricultural AI in Nairobi, Kenya.
